No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to eradicating poverty.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (4.3), skills for work (4.4), and fosters cultural appreciation and an international perspective (4.7).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The instruction to 'Respect Copyright' implies adherence to legal frameworks, aligning with promoting the rule of law (Target 16.10).
